name: trail-route-finder
description: Generate trail running loops around a starting point with a minimum elevation gain (D+) target. Uses self-hosted BRouter (round-trip on OSM path/track data) and IGN RGE ALTI 1m for accurate elevation. Outputs interactive HTML maps with IGN topo tiles plus GPX files. Step 2 pushes a chosen GPX to Garmin Connect via gccli.
